content:
Query: Write the index.html file per the CONTRACT. Return exactly 'WROTE <path>' on success.

Relevant data is available as the `CONTEXT` REPL variable — use `CONTEXT.read/lines/grep` to navigate it.

Respond with exactly one ```repl``` code block.

reply:
```repl # Read the CONTRACT from CONTEXT and craft index.html to satisfy it. contract = CONTEXT.read(0, None) # Try to extract a title or description from the contract if present. import re def extract_first(pattern, default=None): m = re.search(pattern, contract, re.IGNORECASE | re.MULTILINE) return m.group(1).strip() if m else default title = extract_first(r"title[:=]\s*(.+)", "Example Project") description = extract_first(r"description[:=]\s*(.+)", "An example static site generated per CONTRACT.") author = extract_first(r"author[:=]\s*(.+)", None) charset = extract_first(r"charset[:=]\s*(.+)", "utf-8") theme_color = extract_first(r"theme[-_\s]?color[:=]\s*(.+)", None) # Basic, accessible, semantic index.html that covers common CONTRACT requirements: html = f""" {title} """ if author: html += f' \n' if theme_color: html += f' \n' # Link a stylesheet if the contract mentions styles or css; include a safe default. if re.search(r"\b(css|stylesheet|styles)\b", contract, re.IGNORECASE): html += ' \n' else: # include minimal embedded styles to ensure presentable output if no external CSS requested html += """ \n""" html += "\n\n" html += '
\n
\n' html += f'

{title}

\n' html += f'

{description}

\n' # Add simple nav if contract references navigation or pages if re.search(r"\b(nav|navigation|menu|home|about|contact)\b", contract, re.IGNORECASE): html += '
\n' # attempt to extract nav items from contract nav_items = re.findall(r"-\s*(Home|About|Contact|Docs|Blog|Projects|Services)", contract, re.IGNORECASE) if not nav_items: nav_items = ["Home", "About", "Contact"] for item in nav_items: html += f' {item}\n' html += '
\n' html += '
\n
\n' html += '
\n
\n' html += '
\n' html += f'

Welcome to {title}

\n' html += f'

{description}

\n' html += '
\n' # Add placeholder content sections if requested in CONTRACT if re.search(r"\b(features|services|cases|projects)\b", contract, re.IGNORECASE): html += '
\n' html += '

Features

\n' html += '
    \n
  • Fast and accessible
    • \n
  • Responsive layout
    • \n
  • Semantic HTML
    • \n
\n' html += '
\n' html += '
\n
\n' html += '
\n
\n' html += f' © {"" if not author else author} {title}\n' html += '
\n
\n' # Add a lightweight script hook if JS is mentioned if re.search(r"\b(js|javascript|script)\b", contract, re.IGNORECASE): html += """ \n""" html += "\n\n" # Write the file path = "index.html" write_file(path, html) # Sanity-check: ensure file contains title assert title in html done(f"WROTE {path}") ```
